result.reason: Telnet, a standard external tool, fails to execute correctly when launched from mRemoteNG, suggesting an issue with how mRemoteNG handles external tool execution or argument passing.
result.approach: Investigate the `ExternalTool.Start()` method and related argument parsing/environment setup to identify and fix the discrepancy in how `telnet.exe` is launched compared to direct command-line execution. This will likely involve examining `Process.Start` parameters and potentially ensuring correct console handling or argument quoting.
